# `nise cache`

- **Usage**: `nise cache <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/cache/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/cache/mod.rs)

Manage the nise cache

Run `nise cache` with no args to view the current cache directory.

## Subcommands

- [`nise cache clear [TOOL]…`](/cli/cache/clear.md)
- [`nise cache path`](/cli/cache/path.md)
- [`nise cache prune [-v --verbose…] [--dry-run] [TOOL]…`](/cli/cache/prune.md)
